Label: 任務類型
Options/Enum: search_rescue, medical_support, fire_response, supply_delivery, personnel_transport, equipment_transport, cleanup, repair, inspection, info_report, info_update, info_verification, other

Label: 災害類型
Options/Enum: earthquake, landslide, typhoon, flood, tsunami, fire, radiation, epidemic, war, other

Label: 任務描述
Notes: 詳細說明現場需求與狀況

Label: 優先級
Notes: 人工或系統定義緊急程度

Label: 電線桿編號
Notes: 台灣定位輔助（無地址時關鍵識別）

Label: 所需資源
ER_Mapping: derived: task_properties WHERE quantity IS NOT NULL (supply items)

Label: 技能需求
Options/Enum: medical, rescue, driving, cleaning, translation, logistics, repair, firefighting, inspection

Label: 接案者 ID
ER_Mapping: task_assignments (task_uuid FK / actor_uuid FK→users / role / assigned_at)

Label: 受影響人數
Notes: 現場受困、受影響或待救援人數

Disaster_Scope: earthquake, fire, landslide, flood, radiation, war
Label: 危險說明
Notes: 如瓦斯外洩、土石滑動、污染風險

Label: 載具需求
Options/Enum: car, truck, motorcycle, boat, ambulance, helicopter

Label: 運送數量
ER_Mapping: task_properties.quantity (on supply items within the task)

Label: 清理類型
Notes: 清理 / 修復任務適用

Label: 所需工具
Notes: 清理 / 修復任務適用
